CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-28-2024 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Feb-13-2024 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Jun-25-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Motion To Compel Further Responses To Plaintiffs Requests For Production Of Documents, Set One
Off Calendar Aug-22-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. DAVID DERDERIAN, Esq. of Quill & Arrow, LLP (Tel: 310-933-4271) for plaintiffs;
Atty. JENNIFER STEWART, Esq. of King & Spalding LLP (Tel: 415-318-1200) for defendant General Motors LLC.

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFFS JULIA ISIDRO and ERLIE ISIDRO's Motion To Compel Further Responses To Plaintiffs Requests For Production Of Documents, Set One.

Both sides stipulate to the matter being decided by the pro tem judge. The pro tem judge and counsel for both sides (all appearing remotely) authorize the clerk to sign the formal stipulation form on their behalf.

Matter argued and submitted. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Plaintiffs' Motion to compel GRANTED in part and DENIED in part.

(See Word minutes for complete ruling.)

Prevailing party to prepare and submit a proposed order to the pro tem judge at sborrowman@gmail.com.

Judge Pro Tem: Scott Borrowman; Clerk: S. Kane; Not Reported. (302/JPT)
